g.text: If blocked: skip Stage B, enter repair
instead of building a story from scratch; runs
its own bounded Stage-1 fidelity repair loop.
"awaiting_manual_fill" is a fifth status this pipeline does not itself
produce: story_requests/authoring_plan.py parks a skeleton_fill job there
BEFORE this diagram's flow ever runs, when the admin picks mechanism=skill
(a human/skill fills the skeleton offline instead of an LLM call). It is
resumed later via generation/import_story.py's resume function (invoked by
import_cli.py --job), which runs the filled story through the same
validator gate + persist + moderation pipeline and settles it to "passed"
or "needs_review" (a hard gate block instead settles it to "failed").
